description: Stage 15 enemy roster overview showing four enemies: Star Defiler (large purple star with spiral core), Void Fish (small purple star), Abyssal Claw (six-pointed star), and Eye of Illusion (crescent shape)
Star Defiler enemy with ability tooltip: 'Consumes nearby enemies and releases them upon defeat. Takes 50% LESS Fire and Force-field DMG.'
Void Fish enemy with ability tooltip: 'Engages in close-range combat. Takes 50% MORE Fire and Energy DMG.'
Abyssal Claw enemy with ability tooltip: 'Increases the movement speed of nearby enemies. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Energy DMG.'
Eye of Illusion enemy with ability tooltip: 'Grants shields to surrounding enemies upon being eliminated. Takes 50% LESS Force-field DMG. Takes 50% MORE Energy DMG.'
Plague Variant enemy with biohazard symbol (orange/yellow concentric circles). Shows stage progression UI with related enemies: Overload Ring and Overload Triangle below.
Plague Variant with tooltip: 'Leads a swarm of rings and cubes into battle. Takes 50% LESS Electric and Force-field DMG.'
Overload Ring enemy (green circle icon) with tooltip: 'The lower its remaining HP, the less DMG it deals.'
Overload Triangle enemy (orange triangle icon) with tooltip: 'High speed; the lower its HP, the less DMG it deals. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Fire DMG.'
Normal Stage 2 enemies display showing three variants: Overload Ring, Vector Beetle, and Overload Cube.
Vector Beetle enemy - Close-range melee combatant. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Fire damage. Yellow diamond-shaped icon.
Overload Cube enemy - High-speed enemy where lower HP results in less damage dealt. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Fire damage. Yellow square icon.
Stage 3 overview showing Cube Master enemy (orange glowing cube) alongside Overload Ring and Phase Moth.
Cube Master ability: 'Long-range attacks; splits into more cubes upon defeat. Takes 50% LESS Energy damage.'
Phase Moth enemy - Moves diagonally and attacks from range. Takes 100% MORE Fire damage. Yellow V-shaped/wing-like icon.
Stage 4 enemy roster: Overload Ring (lime green circle outline), Phase Moth (yellow star shape), and Vector Beetle (yellow diamond shape).
Stage 5 enemy roster: Central Hive (large yellow hexagon cluster), Vector Beetle, Hexagonal Bee (hexagon cluster), and Crystal Wurm (stacked diamonds).
Central Hive ability: 'Continuously spawns Hexagonal Bees. Takes 50% LESS Physical and Electric DMG.'
Hexagonal Bee ability: 'Splits into two smaller bees upon death. Takes 50% MORE Fire and Energy DMG.'
Crystal Wurm ability: 'Immune to Paralysis, dodges upward after taking DMG. Takes 50% LESS Electric DMG. Takes 50% MORE Fire DMG.'
Stage 6 enemy roster: Overload Ring, Flash Wings (lime green downward-pointing wings), and Overload Cube.
Flash Wings ability: 'Engages in close-range combat. Takes 50% MORE Fire and Force-field DMG.'
Stage 7 enemy roster: Phase Beetle (yellow peace symbol), Vector Beetle, Phase Moth, and Annihilator (green nested diamonds).
Phase Beetle ability: 'Block all ballistics. Takes 50% LESS Electric DMG.'
Annihilator ability: 'Long-range attack. Takes 50% MORE Electric and Force-field DMG.'
Phase Moth in Stage 7 context. Ability: Moves diagonally and attacks from range. Takes 100% MORE Fire DMG.
Stage 8 enemy roster: Overload Ring, Quantum Arrow (blue downward chevron), and Hexagonal Bee.
Quantum Arrow ability: 'Occasionally speeds up. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Electric DMG.'
Stage 9 enemy roster featuring Agile Specter (yellow multi-pointed diamond), alongside Vector Beetle, Overload Cube, and Flash Wings.
Agile Specter ability: 'Dashes side to side when damaged and gains a shield. Takes 50% LESS Physical DMG.'
Stage 10 enemy roster: Mirage (main), Flash Wings, Annihilator, and Shadow Fighter. Lime green neon styling.
Mirage ability: 'Continuously deploys rebel fighters and fires powerful pulse cannons when approaching the shield. Takes 50% LESS Fire and Force-field DMG.'
Shadow Fighter ability: 'Invisible and immune to all projectile DMG. Takes 100% MORE Force-field DMG.'
Stage 11 enemy roster: Mutated Sword (main), Overload Cube, Quantum Arrow, and Vector Beetle. Cyan neon styling.
Mutated Sword ability: 'Reduces our attack power upon reaching the shield. Takes 50% LESS Fire DMG.'
Stage 12 overview: Cube Master (orange glowing cube) with Overload Ring, Fission Triangle (cyan inverted triangle), and Overload Cube.
Fission Triangle ability: 'Splits into smaller fragments upon destruction. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Force-field DMG.'
Stage 13 overview: Dark Leech Eye (purple circular eye with pink center) with Overload Ring, Void Fish, and Annihilator.
Dark Leech Eye ability: 'Restores its HP when it attacks. Takes 50% LESS Force-field DMG.'
Void Fish (purple star shape) in Stage 13 context. Ability: 'Engages in close-range combat. Takes 50% MORE Fire and Energy DMG.'
Stage 14 enemy roster: Phase Beetle (yellow peace sign icon), Overload Cube, Abyssal Claw, and Quantum Arrow.
Abyssal Claw in Stage 14 context. Ability: Increases movement speed of nearby enemies. Takes 50% MORE Physical and Energy DMG.
Stage 15 enemy roster: Star Defiler (purple spiral triangle icon) with Void Fish, Abyssal Claw, and Eye of Illusion.
Eye of Illusion in Stage 15 context. Ability: Grants shields to surrounding enemies upon being eliminated. Takes 50% LESS Force-field DMG. Takes 50% MORE Energy DMG.
Star Defiler in Stage 15 context. Ability: Consumes nearby enemies and releases them upon defeat. Takes 50% LESS Fire and Force-field DMG.
